details.test: Task 1: Register for evening community dinner under $20, wheelchair accessible
Task 2: Sign up for earliest weekend 3+ hr kitchen shift at Downtown Kitchen Hub
Task 3: Create 3-recipe inclusive dinner menu for 4 with GF and vegan options
Task 4: Favorite two top-rated Central City restaurants with braille menus & vegan options under $25
Task 5: Setup $15 monthly donation to Inclusive Cooking Classes with fee coverage & quarterly updates
Task 6: Register for donation-based allergy-friendly evening event in next 30 days
Task 7: Subscribe to monthly newsletter with inclusive recipes, advocacy, and local events
Task 8: Save visual impairment and sensory-friendly dining articles to reading list
Task 9: Find accessible venue for group of 8 with transit access and send inquiry
